prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the EA888 Gen 3 (CJXC/CJXB) 2.0L TSI engine with upgraded IS38 turbocharger, utilizing a custom 28mm wastegate actuator and a 3.5" V-band downpipe with a 400-cell catalytic converter from Milltek Sport for optimized spool and flow dynamics

Forge Motorsport Motorsport Series intercooler (FMIC) with a 60mm core thickness and integrated diverter valve relocation kit, paired with a 3.5" silicone charge pipe system from Vibrant Performance for reduced heat soak and consistent intake temperatures under sustained boost (targeting 26-28 psi on E85)

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with custom valving for the MQB platform, featuring 30-way adjustable damping and 20mm of front/rear drop, paired with H&R 24mm front and 27mm rear anti-roll bars with spherical end links from 034 Motorsport for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response
estetica: Rieger Tuning RS-style front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter and canards, designed specifically for the MK7 GTI (part #RGTI7-01), paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with a satin clear coat for a stealth OEM+ appearance

OEM+ Euro-spec LED tail lights with sequential turn signals (VW part #5G0945096G) and a custom rear diffuser from Maxton Design (part #MAXTON-MK7GTI-RD) featuring integrated carbon fiber fins and a central exhaust cutout for a 102mm titanium exhaust tip from Akrapovic

Neuspeed RSE10 19x9.5" ET40 forged wheels in Satin Black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19) with a custom 5x112 to 5x120 hub conversion using adapters from WCI Racing, paired with Brembo GT 355mm 6-piston front and 330mm 4-piston rear big brake kit (part #09.9505.11)
